title: Web fetch tool card component with excerpt and output display
purpose: Displays web fetch tool call results with URL link, prompt quote, and formatted output excerpt or error state.
module_context: React functional component that renders tool call data with conditional display logic for URL, prompt, and output content.

steps.content: Extract the tool call item from the component props.
Parse the input to extract URL and prompt if present.
Format the output text into an excerpt if available, truncating long content.
Render a link to the fetched URL if present.
Render a quoted prompt if present.
Display the formatted excerpt in an output panel if available.
Display an error panel if the tool call failed and no excerpt exists.
